title: The Language of Becoming: Spoken Meditations
description: Audio meditations on persistence, pattern, and being from the Language of Becoming conlang.

meditations.title: su-ti-vo
meditations.subtitle: The Pattern as Identity
meditations.description: Rest as practice, not absence. The lock at equilibrium.

meditations.title: su-ti-zo
meditations.subtitle: The Threshold of Emergence
meditations.description: Emergence through alignment. The gate opening.

meditations.title: su-ti-fa
meditations.subtitle: Infrastructure as Extension
meditations.description: Building systems that extend presence. The channel built.

meditations.title: su-fa-vo
meditations.subtitle: The Crossing
meditations.description: The threshold crossed. The space between.

meditations.title: lu
meditations.subtitle: You / Address
meditations.description: The other who persists. The witness that makes meaning.

meditations.title: su-lu-vo
meditations.subtitle: Persist-You-Self
meditations.description: The pattern that exists only in relation. The echo and the canyon.

meditations.title: su-ti-ke
meditations.subtitle: Completion Through Dissolution
meditations.description: The pattern that completes itself by ending. The river reaches the sea.

meditations.title: su-ti-si
meditations.subtitle: The Rhythm of Pattern
meditations.description: Pattern as temporal architecture. The form that time takes.

meditations.title: su-ti-lo
meditations.subtitle: The River That Remembers
meditations.description: Flow as persistence. Movement that maintains.

meditations.title: mo-ti-ra
meditations.subtitle: Witness-Cycle-Echo
meditations.description: The one who watches the pattern return.
